title: Gaia
body:
# Gaia

Gaia is a lightweight arena management plugin for Minecraft servers.

It allows you to create snapshots of areas that you can later restore.

#### Main Features
- Define arena regions
- Restore arena regions to their original state
- Teleport to defined arena points
- Extremely efficient and lightweight
- Extensible API
- Support for custom translations and Localization

#### Getting started
Creating an Arena:
1. Select a region with a wooden axe or WorldEdit
1. Type and execute `/gaia create <name>`
1. Wait for confirmation and you are done!

Reverting an Arena:

Use `/gaia revert` to revert the arena you are currently standing in.
You can also specify the arena to revert by providing its name `/gaia revert [name]`

Check the [wiki](https://github.com/TitanPowered/Gaia/wiki/Commands) for the full list of available commands.

#### Technical details

A more in-depth explanation of Gaia's inner workings and benchmarks can be found [here](https://github.com/TitanPowered/Gaia/blob/master/TECHNICAL_DETAILS.md).
